header.title: Image Manager
header.subtitle: Browse, clean and free up space used by chat & generated images.
select.pageTitle: Select all images on this page
select.allTitle: Select ALL images in the current view (every page)
select.downloadTitle: Download selected files (bundled into a .zip on desktop)
select.hideTitle: Hide selected from this manager (does not delete files)
select.trashTitle: Move selected to the recycle bin (files stay on disk, restorable)
select.restoreTitle: Restore selected from the recycle bin
select.deleteTitle: Permanently delete selected files from the server
toolbar.selectAllTitle: Select ALL images in the current view (every page)
toolbar.showHiddenTitle: Show ONLY hidden images (toggle off to return to normal images)
sidebar.resizerTitle: Drag to resize · double-click to collapse
sidebar.title: Folders
sidebar.subtitle: Each folder is a character's image folder on the server.
trash.emptyTitle: Permanently delete everything in the recycle bin
empty.none: No images here. Nothing to clean!
breadcrumb.sharedHint: SillyTavern keeps one image folder per character NAME. Different characters with the same name share this folder — that's a server limitation, not a bug. Tip: sort by Name or use search to group a single bot's files (they have different prefixes).
breadcrumb.trashHint: Items here are NOT yet removed from disk — they still take up space. Restore them, or use Empty / Delete to remove them for good. Auto-clean can purge old items after the chosen number of days.
resize.title: Drag to resize
wand.title: Open the Image Manager to browse and clean stored images
toast.trashed.many: Moved {{count}} image(s) to the recycle bin.
toast.autoCleaned: Auto-cleaned {{count}} old item(s) from the recycle bin.
toast.emptyConfirm.title: Empty the recycle bin ({{count}})?
toast.emptyConfirm.body: This permanently removes every file in the recycle bin from the server.
toast.deleteConfirm.bodyOne: This permanently removes the file from the server.
toast.deleteConfirm.bodyMany: This permanently removes the selected files from the server.
toast.zipFallback: Couldn't build the .zip — saving files individually instead.
viewer.trash: Move this image to the recycle bin
viewer.restore: Restore this image from the recycle bin
